articles.title: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
articles.description: The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.

articles.title: Prince William selling 20% of duchy property for housing and nature projects
articles.description: The Duchy of Cornwall is to sell part of its 128,000 acre estate and re-invest in more housing.

articles.title: UK companies linked to payments for small boat crossings, BBC finds
articles.description: Smugglers are directing migrants to pay using a network of British businesses, secret filming reveals.

articles.title: Are baby boomers like me the luckiest generation in history?
